title: 3Pcs Feeding Tube Brush Set, Refrigerator Scrub Brushes, Flexible Feeding Tube Cleaning Brush and Pipe Drain Cleaner for Shower Kitchen Refrigerator Drain Hole
features: ✔【Safe Material】 Robust material handle is made of high-quality stainless steel and brush made of nylon bristles. Elastic and still sturdy, rust-proof, flexible and free to bend, heat-resistant and durable.

✔【Easy Operation】 Insert the flexible handle (brush end first) into the hose and gently scrub the inside as you take out the brush. The flexible yet robust wire body snakes through effortlessly and goes deep into any drain. Bristles softly scrub away stain buildup, simply repeat the same operation multiple times to easily clean sewer.

✔【Useful】 One end of the brush is a tubular brush, and the other end is a looped end, the round head treatment of the tip of the brush head prevents scratches on the inner wall of the straw, gently wipe away bacteria and stains without damaging the pipeline.

✔【Wide Application】 This refrigerator cleaning kit is suitable for refrigerators and freezers of various brands. Can also be used to clean bathrooms, sinks, tubs, kitchens, plumbing and other commonly clogged areas, such as filter system, glass tube, water pump accessories, meet your various cleaning needs.

✔【Cleaning Kit】 Includes 1 stainless steel feeding tube brush and 2 pistons, Cleaning brush is about 150 cm/ 59 inches. Easily access hard-to-reach spaces and remove trash from pipes with ease. Tube cleaning brush is a great helper for cleaning your kitchen.
description: Product Description Feeding Tube Brush Set This Super Flexible long brush is an ultimate weapon in cleaning hard-to-reach narrow pips/tubes. The long neck enables a flexible reaching to the hard-to-reach places. Simple operation, one person can do the household refrigerator cleaning work. They are made of stainless steel and durable nylon rotating bristles with scratch free head. Suit for you periodically clean drainage holes to prevent clogging. Features: 1. It helps to clean the refrigerator drainage hole, solve the leakage problem, and remove the clean smell caused by the clogging. 2.No more need to hire expensive plumbers, one person can do the household refrigerator cleaning work, it is a good helper for cleaning the refrigerator, saving you a lot of time and money. 3.Ideal for cleaning refrigerator drains, car roof drains or other long pipes. It can also be used to clean bathrooms, kitchens, sinks and bathtubs. 4.The sink cleaning brush can effectively clean the fish tank cleaning, filter system. Easy access to hard-to-reach spaces and easy removal of rubbish in pipes. Specifications: Material:Stainless steel, Nylon Bristles, PVC Package Include: 1 x Feeding Tube Brush 2 x Pistons Size: 150 cm Feeding Tube Brush, 6 cm Bristles, 9.5 cm Piston Warm Notes: 1. Please rinse with clean water after each use and hang in a dry place and keep away from children under 3. 2. Please do not use it at high temperature for a long time to avoid damage to the bristles.
